vocab.meaning: sở thích đã duy trì từ rất lâu
vocab.example: Painting has been a long-standing hobby of mine, dating back to my early primary school days.

vocab.meaning: nuôi dưỡng niềm đam mê dành cho
vocab.example: My parents helped me nurture a passion for music by enrolling me in piano classes when I was just five.

vocab.meaning: những năm tháng hình thành tính cách (thời thơ ấu)
vocab.example: I took up stamp collecting during my formative years, and it has remained a fascinating pursuit ever since.

vocab.meaning: trường tồn với thời gian (không bị mai một)
vocab.example: While many of my childhood interests were fleeting, my love for reading has truly stood the test of time.

vocab.meaning: bắt nguồn từ, có nguồn gốc từ
vocab.example: I can trace my obsession with astronomy back to a stargazing trip I took with my grandfather a decade ago.

vocab.meaning: gợi lại cảm giác hoài niệm
vocab.example: Building model planes always evokes a sense of nostalgia for my carefree childhood afternoons.

vocab.meaning: một phần thiết yếu trong bản sắc/con người tôi
vocab.example: Swimming has been an integral part of my identity as I have spent almost every summer in the pool since I was a toddler.

vocab.meaning: khơi dậy lại niềm yêu thích đối với cái gì
vocab.example: After a long hiatus, I’ve recently managed to rekindle an interest in chess, a game I adored as a young boy.

vocab.meaning: sự nhiệt huyết không hề lay chuyển
vocab.example: I still pursue photography with the same unwavering enthusiasm that I had when I got my first camera at age ten.

vocab.meaning: một đam mê theo đuổi suốt đời
vocab.example: For me, learning foreign languages is a lifelong pursuit that began with simple picture books in kindergarten.
